description.en: Creates a point of sale in a store to receive payments for products or services. Each POS will have a unique QR code linked to it.
Returns full details of a post-sale claim including status, stage, and players.
Returns the description and metadata for a specific claim reason code.
Sends a text message (with optional attachments) in the claim thread.

title.en: Send a message in a claim

description.en: Uploads and attaches a file (image, PDF) to a claim. Supported formats: JPEG, PNG, PDF. Max size: 10 MB.
File to attach (JPEG, PNG, or PDF, max 10 MB)

title.en: Attach a file to a claim message

description.en: Escalates a claim to mediation, requesting MP to intervene in the dispute.
Returns the possible resolution options for a claim at the mediation stage.
Uploads shipping evidence (tracking code, proof of delivery) to support the seller's case in a claim. Accepted as part of the claims resolution process.
Tracking code or delivery confirmation reference
A post-sale claim (dispute) between buyer and seller
mediations — buyer-initiated dispute requiring MP mediation; claims — seller-initiated claim
Current stage in the dispute lifecycle
Resource type the claim is about
A message within a claim thread
A reason code for opening a claim
Expected resolution options at mediation stage
Text content of the message to send

message.example: I can provide the tracking code for the shipment.

description.en: File IDs to attach (upload first via attachments endpoint)
When true the POS amount is fixed and cannot be changed by payer
Webhook URL for this specific POS
QR code data string for this POS
Whether there are more results available
Total number of payments matching the criteria
